TEXT.source: Sakizaya Wikipedia, article: itini_i_kitakit_u_sadawmi’ay_a_subal_世界上最便宜的島嶼
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == (1)kakilimam: == (2)nilacul: 1:sepat malebut tulu lasubu dada' a kalisiw, caay yaca pakacakay, wicaay haw sa walu bataan kayadah ku sizi. 2:midang, mala u kalimulakan nu kauzipan nu tademaw minakawaw, amu silawad min ku tademaw haw sa, miladai tu cabay i luma'ay a tademaw taputah midang, caay min kalecal ku piazih tu sacumaay a piidangan
S.PHON: == (*)kakir~ɾimam: == (*)nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ: *:səpat mar~ɾəbut tur~ɾu r~ɾasubu dadaʔ~ʡ a kar~ɾisiw, ʦaaj jaʦa pakaʦakaj, wiʦaaj ħaw sa war~ɾu bataan kajadaħ ku sizi. *:midaŋ, mar~ɾa u kar~ɾimur~ɾakan nu kauzipan nu tadəmaw minakawaw, amu sir~ɾawad min ku tadəmaw ħaw sa, mir~ɾadai tu ʦabaj i r~ɾumaʔ~ʡaj a tadəmaw taputaħ midaŋ, ʦaaj min kar~ɾəʦar~ɾ ku piaziħ tu saʦumaaj a piidaŋan
S.FORM: == (1)kakilimam: == (2)nilacul: 1:sepat malebut tulu lasubu dada' a kalisiw, caay yaca pakacakay, wicaay haw sa walu bataan kayadah ku sizi. 2:midang, mala u kalimulakan nu kauzipan nu tademaw minakawaw, amu silawad min ku tademaw haw sa, miladai tu cabay i luma'ay a tademaw taputah midang, caay min kalecal ku piazih tu sacumaay a piidangan
S.PHON: == (*)kakir~ɾimam: == (*)nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ: *:səpat mar~ɾəbut tur~ɾu r~ɾasubu dadaʔ~ʡ a kar~ɾisiw, ʦaaj jaʦa pakaʦakaj, wiʦaaj ħaw sa war~ɾu bataan kajadaħ ku sizi. *:midaŋ, mar~ɾa u kar~ɾimur~ɾakan nu kauzipan nu tadəmaw minakawaw, amu sir~ɾawad min ku tadəmaw ħaw sa, mir~ɾadai tu ʦabaj i r~ɾumaʔ~ʡaj a tadəmaw taputaħ midaŋ, ʦaaj min kar~ɾəʦar~ɾ ku piaziħ tu saʦumaaj a piidaŋan
